Acne.description: Acne is a skin condition that occurs when hair follicles become clogged with oil and dead skin cells.
Acne.precautions: Keep skin clean, avoid oily cosmetics, maintain healthy diet

Arthritis.description: Arthritis is inflammation of one or more joints causing pain and stiffness.
Arthritis.causes: Age, joint wear and tear, autoimmune conditions
Arthritis.precautions: Regular exercise, maintain healthy weight, avoid joint injuries

Bronchial Asthma.description: Bronchial Asthma is a condition where airways narrow and swell, producing extra mucus.
Bronchial Asthma.precautions: Avoid triggers, use inhalers as prescribed, keep environment clean

Cervical spondylosis.description: Cervical spondylosis is age-related wear and tear affecting spinal disks in the neck.
Cervical spondylosis.precautions: Maintain good posture, regular neck exercises, ergonomic workspace

Chicken pox.description: Chicken pox is a contagious viral infection causing itchy rash and red spots.
Chicken pox.precautions: Vaccination, avoid contact with infected individuals

Common Cold.description: Common Cold is a viral infection of the upper respiratory tract.
Common Cold.precautions: Wash hands frequently, avoid close contact with sick people

Dengue.description: Dengue is a mosquito-borne viral infection causing high fever and joint pain.
Dengue.precautions: Use mosquito repellents, remove stagnant water

Dimorphic Hemorrhoids.description: Dimorphic Hemorrhoids are swollen veins in the lower rectum and anus.
Dimorphic Hemorrhoids.causes: Straining during bowel movements, chronic constipation
Dimorphic Hemorrhoids.precautions: High-fiber diet, drink plenty of water, avoid prolonged sitting

Fungal infection.description: Fungal infection is a skin disease caused by fungi affecting skin, nails, or hair.
Fungal infection.causes: Warm and moist environment, weak immunity
Fungal infection.precautions: Keep skin dry, maintain hygiene, avoid sharing personal items

Hypertension.description: Hypertension is a condition in which blood pressure levels are consistently high.
Hypertension.precautions: Reduce salt intake, regular exercise, monitor blood pressure

Impetigo.description: Impetigo is a contagious bacterial skin infection causing red sores.
Impetigo.precautions: Maintain hygiene, avoid scratching, wash hands regularly

Jaundice.description: Jaundice is a condition causing yellowing of skin and eyes due to liver issues.
Jaundice.causes: Liver infection, hepatitis, bile duct obstruction
Jaundice.precautions: Avoid alcohol, maintain hygiene, get vaccinated for hepatitis

Malaria.description: Malaria is a parasitic disease transmitted by infected mosquitoes.

Migraine.description: Migraine is a neurological condition causing intense headaches.
Migraine.causes: Stress, hormonal changes, lack of sleep
Migraine.precautions: Avoid triggers, regular sleep schedule, stress management

Pneumonia.description: Pneumonia is an infection that inflames air sacs in one or both lungs.

Psoriasis.description: Psoriasis is a chronic autoimmune condition causing rapid skin cell buildup.
Psoriasis.precautions: Moisturize skin, avoid stress, follow prescribed treatment

Typhoid.description: Typhoid is a bacterial infection caused by Salmonella Typhi.
Typhoid.precautions: Drink clean water, wash hands, avoid street food

Varicose Veins.description: Varicose Veins are enlarged, twisted veins usually appearing in legs.
Varicose Veins.precautions: Exercise regularly, avoid long standing, elevate legs

Allergy.description: Allergy is an immune system reaction to foreign substances.

Diabetes.description: Diabetes is a chronic condition affecting blood sugar regulation.
Diabetes.precautions: Healthy diet, regular exercise, monitor blood sugar

Drug reaction.description: Drug reaction is an unwanted effect caused by medication.
Drug reaction.causes: Allergic response or side effects of medicines
Drug reaction.precautions: Avoid self-medication, consult doctor before taking new drugs

Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).description: GERD is a digestive disorder where stomach acid irritates the food pipe.
Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).causes: Weak lower esophageal sphincter, obesity, spicy food
Gastroesophageal reflux disease (GERD).precautions: Avoid spicy food, eat smaller meals, avoid lying down after eating

Peptic ulcer disease.description: Peptic ulcer disease involves sores that develop on the lining of the stomach.
Peptic ulcer disease.causes: Helicobacter pylori infection, prolonged NSAID use
Peptic ulcer disease.precautions: Avoid NSAIDs misuse, limit alcohol, eat balanced diet

Urinary tract infection.description: Urinary tract infection is an infection in any part of the urinary system.
Urinary tract infection.precautions: Drink plenty of water, maintain hygiene, avoid holding urine
